hero.title: Strategic Advisory for Public Sector Modernization.
hero.subtitle: Applied Policy Systems LLC bridges the gap between written regulations and the operational realities of government. We provide the structural evaluation and strategic guidance necessary to ensure that complex administrative systems achieve statutory fidelity, operational efficiency, and equitable access.

challenge.label: The Implementation Disconnect
challenge.title: Policy is written in statutes. Systems are built in code. We translate between the two.
challenge.text: Public administration technology fails when there is a gap between legislative mandates and software engineering. Off-the-shelf software often lacks the structural nuance required by federal regulations, while custom builds become paralyzed by complex policy requirements.
challenge.solution: Applied Policy Systems bridges this gap by translating statutory rules into deterministic logic and actionable digital infrastructure.

infrastructure.label: Infrastructure Expertise
infrastructure.title: Structural Modernization.
infrastructure.text: We architect secure, high-fidelity infrastructure for government agencies to deliver complex services with absolute precision.

sandbox.label: Proof of Concept
sandbox.title: The Translation in Practice
sandbox.text: The interactive system below shows this in action. Use the toggles to switch perspectives. The Resident view demonstrates secure document submission and a plain-language benefits assistant. The Caseworker view demonstrates automated data extraction and a statutory policy copilot.

hero.label: About Us
hero.title: Bridging the Disconnect in Public Administration.

founder.title: Graham O'Neill, Founder & Principal Consultant
founder.intro: Graham O’Neill is a public sector innovator and technology strategist with over 15 years of experience optimizing complex government systems.
founder.p1: His career is defined by successfully translating legislative mandates into actionable, compliant digital infrastructure. From municipal revenue operations to federal advisory roles, Graham has consistently focused on making policy work for the people it is intended to serve by bridging the gap between written regulations and operational realities.
founder.p2: Before founding Applied Policy Systems LLC, Graham held senior leadership and advisory positions across all levels of government, where he specialized in the structural evaluation of benefits access and the modernization of tax administration programs.

hero.label: Consultation
hero.title: Start the conversation.
hero.subtitle: Whether you're a government agency looking to modernize or a technology vendor seeking policy alignment, our architectural experts are ready to consult.

ai.title: Consult with our AI Assistant
ai.desc: Our specialized consulting assistant can help triage your needs and provide immediate architectural insights.

cta.title: Ready for a deep dive?
cta.desc: Our team is available for formal architectural reviews, statutory mapping workshops, and modernization strategy sessions.

hero.label: Consulting Expertise
hero.title: Bridging the gap between policy and implementation.

science.title: Strategic Implementation Science
science.desc: We bridge the gap between legislative intent and operational reality. Our experts optimize complex government workflows to ensure that administrative systems achieve their intended policy outcomes with maximum efficiency.

compliance.title: Compliance & Risk Diagnostics
compliance.desc: Deep-dive audits of state-level payment error rates (SNAP/Medicaid). We identify systemic vulnerabilities and conceptualize real-time intervention mechanisms to mitigate risks before they trigger federal sanctions.

data.title: Interagency Data Strategy
data.desc: Architecting secure data-sharing frameworks between tax and human services. We specialize in cross-referencing non-filer data to maximize benefit uptake without compromising PII or system integrity.

fidelity.title: System Fidelity Evaluation
fidelity.desc: Independent third-party verification of Rules-as-Code architectures. We audit system logic to ensure absolute statutory compliance and maximum accessibility for frontline navigators.

cta.title: Ready to optimize your agency's operations?
cta.desc: Our strategic consultants are ready to help you bridge the gap between policy mandates and technical implementation.

advisory.title: Strategic Advisory
advisory.desc: Bridging the gap between policy and implementation through rigorous process optimization.

architecture.title: Technical Architecture
architecture.desc: Structural blueprints for modernization, ensuring 100% statutory fidelity and precision.

insights.title: Policy Insights
insights.desc: Empirical evaluation and historical analysis of complex administrative outcomes.
